scripts.dev: concurrently -n "frontend,gateway,heart,go,rust,cpp" -c "cyan,magenta,red,blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:orchestrator" "npm run dev:go" "npm run dev:rust" "npm run dev:cpp"
scripts.dev:orchestrator: nodemon --watch apps/frontend/src/server --ext go --exec "cd apps/frontend/src/server && go run map_server_rendering.go"
scripts.dev:go: nodemon --watch apps/frontend/src/server/go-backend --ext go --exec "cd apps/frontend/src/server/go-backend/cmd/core && go run main.go"
